summary: Frontend-only verification of Mulish font theme overhaul + Suud-style 'Görünümü Tamamla' combo cards + mobile UX simplification (header/menu/checkout). All 7 acceptance criteria passed via Playwright at 390x844 mobile viewport against the public preview URL. No backend testing performed (per request).
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.jsx line 195: dedup logic only handles allImages[0]===allImages[1]; broader dedup via Set could prevent edge cases when a third image duplicates
Cart.jsx line 41: useEffect deps disable react-hooks/exhaustive-deps and depend only on items.length — quantity changes won't refresh suggestions/deals (probably acceptable but worth a comment)
Header.jsx line 75: useEffect missing 'popularSearches.length' from deps; eslint suppression not present, may warn
test_credentials: Admin: admin@facette.com / admin123 (not used; no auth flow tested)
seed_data_creation: None. Test product /urun/frame-citcitli-bluz-siyah-2779 already had 4 combo items; cart-suggestions endpoint returned 8 items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mulish font + light weights confirmed (body computed font-family contains Mulish, weight 300; checkout h1 weight 200). Mobile (390x844) header verified: hamburger [data-testid=mobile-menu-btn], centered FACETTE text logo (md:hidden), search [data-testid=search-btn] + cart [data-testid=cart-btn] visible, User/account icon correctly hidden on mobile (hidden md:inline-flex). Mobile menu: 4 top items (En Yeniler, Giyim, Aksesuar, Sale), Giyim+Aksesuar are <details> accordions default closed and expand on click; bottom bg-stone-50 panel has all 4 service links (Giriş Yap / Üye Ol, Sipariş Takibi, İletişim, İade & Değişim). ProductDetail combo: [data-testid=product-combo-section] renders with title 'Görünümü Tamamla' and 4 [data-testid=combo-product-{id}] cards in image+bookmark+name+price format. Cart suggestions: [data-testid=cart-suggestions-block] with 'Görünümü Tamamla' title and 8 [data-testid=cart-suggestion-{id}] items. Checkout page bg is rgb(255,255,255), h1 'Sipariş Onayı' weight 200, cards bg-white with 0px border-radius (sharp edges).
